subcodes.first_line: We make mention of thee, as a token of Our grace, for verily We are the All-Remembering, the All-Knowing. Say: O Suns of My Names and Manifestations of My Love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ذکرناک فضلا من عندنا و انا الذاکر العلیم قل یا شموس اسمائی و مظاهر حبی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
